title: Discover NLR
text:
Our Core Values
We are looking for employees whose values align with ours. Our core values encompass a safe and supportive work environment, leadership for societal impact, integrity, creativity, and excellence.
Colorado Living
Location, location, location. It's one reason many NLR employees enjoy working here. Our main campus in Golden, Colorado, is nestled in the foothills of the Rocky Mountains. And it's just 20 minutes west of Denver. View map.
Benefits and Perks
As an employee, you'll receive benefits beyond basic health care and life insurance.
Living Laboratory
